examples: Herr Schulmann cannot be here to welcome you and has asked me to deputize.
"We were in pretty bad shape," Dr Herr recalls.
"I have some cash," I said, looking around for Mein Herr.
Merrill Lynch spokesman Mark Herr said the company had not seen the suit and declined comment.
Herr spoke by video teleconference, saying he had found probable cause to move ahead with the case.
